content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "postgresql"7	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          Role      @default(USER)16	  restaurants   Restaurant[]17	  orders        Order[]18	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())19	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt20	}21	22	enum Role {23	  USER24	  ADMIN25	  OWNER26	}27	28	model Restaurant {29	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())30	  name        String31	  description String?32	  address     String33	  ownerId     String34	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])35	  menuItems   MenuItem[]36	  orders      Order[]37	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())38	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt39	}40	41	model MenuItem {42	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())43	  name         String44	  description  String?45	  price        Float46	  restaurantId String47	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])48	  orderItems   OrderItem[]49	  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())50	  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt51	}52	53	model Order {54	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())55	  userId       String56	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])57	  restaurantId String58	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])59	  items        OrderItem[]60	  total        Float61	  status       OrderStatus @default(PENDING)62	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())63	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt64	}65	66	enum OrderStatus {67	  PENDING68	  PREPARING69	  READY70	  DELIVERED71	  CANCELLED72	}73	74	model OrderItem {75	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())76	  orderId    String77	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])78	  menuItemId String79	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])80	  quantity   Int81	  price      Float82	}
